summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 5 features: Real Xaman API integration, webhook verification, liquidity convenience fields, and AnimatedCounter bug fix. Backend tests: 35/37 passed (94.6%). Frontend tests: All major features working correctly.

Returns 400 'only available in mock mode' in real mode
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior in real mode - not a bug

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1
